Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class VirtualVisitConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.VirtualVisitConfig
public class VirtualVisitConfig extends Metadata

Java class for VirtualVisitConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="VirtualVisitConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="comprehendServiceType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}VirtualVisitComprehendServiceType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="experienceCloudSiteUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalMsgServiceIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalRoleIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="externalUserIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="messagingRegion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="namedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="storageBucketName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="usageType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}VirtualVisitUsageType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="videoCallApptTypeValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="videoControlRegion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="visitRegion" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}VirtualVisitVisitRegion" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
